login.heading: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to CARIZO
login.verifyHint: Register again or check your email inbox
login.fbDisclosurePre: By signing in with Facebook, you accept our
login.fbDisclosurePost: . We only create a new account after your confirmation.

register.successDescBefore: We have sent a verification link to
register.successDescLine2: Click the link in the email to activate your account.
register.successTipPre: Don't see the email? Check your spam folder or
register.heading: Sign up
register.subtitle: Join the CARIZO community
register.ageHint: You must be at least 18 years old.
register.gdprPre: I consent to the processing of my personal data by CARIZO Wiktor Niezgoda for the purpose of providing electronic services, in accordance with the
register.marketing: I consent to receiving commercial information and special offers from CARIZO by electronic means. You can withdraw your consent at any time.
register.fbDisclosurePre: By signing in with Facebook, you accept our
register.fbDisclosurePost: . We only create a new account after your confirmation.
register.valTerms: You must accept the Terms of Service and the Privacy Policy.
register.valGdpr: Consent to the processing of personal data is required.
register.valPasswordLength: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
register.valPhone: Enter a valid phone number (min. 9 digits).
register.valBusinessType: Choose a business account type (Dealer / Used car lot / Company).
register.valNip: The Tax ID (NIP) must consist of exactly 10 digits.
register.resendSuccess: The verification link has been sent again.
register.resendError: Failed to send the link. Please try again.

forgotPassword.heading: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.successTextBefore: If an account with the address
forgotPassword.successTextAfter: exists, we have sent it an email with a password reset link. Please also check your SPAM folder.

resetPassword.heading: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Set a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidToken: The password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.successText: Your password has been changed. You can now sign in using your new password.
resetPassword.valLength: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
resetPassword.apiErrorFallback: The link has expired or is invalid. Please send a new request.

verifyEmail.successDescLine1: Your account has been successfully activated.
verifyEmail.successDescLine2: You can now sign in and use CARIZO.
verifyEmail.errorTitle: The link has expired or is invalid
verifyEmail.errorDescLine1: The verification link has expired (valid for 24 hours) or is invalid.
verifyEmail.errorDescLine2: You can request a new link.
verifyEmail.resendMsgSuccess: If the account exists and is not verified, we have sent a new link.
verifyEmail.resendMsgError: Failed to send. Please try again.

newsletterConfirm.successText: Thank you! Your email address has been confirmed. You will receive the latest listings and news from CARIZO.
newsletterConfirm.errorText: This confirmation link is invalid or has expired. Please try subscribing again.

dataDeletion.okDesc: Your data from your Facebook account (account identifier) has been deleted from CARIZO.
dataDeletion.errorDesc: This data deletion status link is invalid or has expired.
